description: Letter fragment in the hand of Peraḥya b. Yosef Yiju addressed to Avraham b. Aharon ha-Kohen, with greetings to sons Abū ʿAlī and Abū l-Surūr. Mentions: being insulted; a dispute involving 30 dinars and a plan to write a letter to the Rayyis; "he said to Abū Naṣr and Abū l-Faraj, that he only wished to obtain the signatures and send them to the Rayyis, because you are ordering (good) and forbidding (bad) . . ."; a government official (ḥājib) named ʿIzz al-Mulk; and "Rabbenu Sayyidnā Moshe" (probably Maimonides). The address includes a blessing for whoever delivers it (מוצלה ברוך יהיה) and a curse for whoever diverts it from its addressee (מצייעה ארור יהיה). (Information in part from Goitein's index card and CUDL.)
description_he: שבר מכתב בכתב יד פרחיה ב. יוסף יג'ו המופנה לאברהם ב. אהרון הכהן. מזכיר עלבון, מחלוקת על 30 דינרים, פקיד ממשל בשם עז אל-מולק, ו'רבנו סיידנא משה' (כנראה הרמב"ם)
